title.en: The 2.4 GHz Receiver: Sensitivity, CCA, RSSI, LQI and PHY Management
title.zh: 2.4 GHz 接收机：灵敏度、CCA、RSSI、LQI 与 PHY 管理

blocks.en: Part 1 of this clause taught how the 2.4 GHz PHY (physical layer) builds and transmits a signal. Part 2 flips the radio around and looks at the receiver: how good a receiver must be to call itself compliant, and how it reports back to the upper layers what it heard. A device (DEV) is the basic node in a high-rate wireless personal area network (HR-WPAN). The standard does not tell a vendor how to build the receiver; instead it sets minimum performance bars that any honest implementation must clear. This lesson is a coverage map of clause 11.6 (receiver specifications) and clause 11.7 (PHY management).
blocks.zh: 本章的第 1 部分讲的是 2.4 GHz PHY（物理层）如何构建并发射信号。第 2 部分则把电台反过来看接收机：一个接收机要达到怎样的水准才能称为合规，以及它如何把所听到的内容上报给上层。DEV（device，设备）是高速无线个域网（HR-WPAN）中的基本节点。标准并不规定厂商如何造接收机，而是设定任何诚实的实现都必须越过的最低性能门槛。本课是对 11.6 条（接收机规范）与 11.7 条（PHY 管理）的覆盖地图。

blocks.en: Everything in clause 11.6 hangs off one shared yardstick, the error rate criterion (11.6.1). The standard defines 'working correctly' as a frame error ratio (FER) below 8% when sending a 1024-octet payload of pseudo-random data (a PN23 sequence, generated by the recurrence x(n+1) = x(n,23) + x(n,5) + 1). Crucially, the measured frame includes not just the 1024-octet payload but also the PHY preamble, the PHY header, the MAC header, the HCS (header check sequence), and the FCS (frame check sequence) — so the whole on-air frame must survive, not just the data. Every sensitivity, input-level and jamming number below is defined as 'the condition under which this 8% FER is still met.'
blocks.zh: 11.6 条里的一切都挂在同一把共享标尺上，即错误率准则（11.6.1）。标准把“正确工作”定义为：发送 1024 字节的伪随机数据（PN23 序列，由递推式 x(n+1) = x(n,23) + x(n,5) + 1 生成）时，帧错误率（FER）低于 8%。关键在于，被测帧不仅包含 1024 字节的载荷，还包含 PHY 前导、PHY 头、MAC 头、HCS（头校验序列）和 FCS（帧校验序列）——也就是说整个空口帧都必须存活，而不只是数据部分。下文所有灵敏度、输入电平和抗干扰数值，都被定义为“在仍满足该 8% FER 的条件下”。

blocks.en: Receiver sensitivity (11.6.2) is the weakest incoming signal, in dBm, at which the receiver still meets the 8% FER. Because this PHY supports several modulation formats, each one gets its own reference sensitivity in Table 11-18, and a compliant DEV must hit at least that bar for every format it claims to support. More robust (lower-order) modulations can hear fainter signals: QPSK-TCM (quadrature phase-shift keying with trellis-coded modulation) reaches −82 dBm, DQPSK (differential QPSK) −75 dBm, and the bar climbs as the constellation grows: 16-QAM-TCM −74 dBm, 32-QAM-TCM −71 dBm, 64-QAM-TCM −68 dBm (QAM = quadrature amplitude modulation). The sensitivity is checked after error correction is applied, and a real device is allowed to be better than the reference.
blocks.zh: 接收灵敏度（11.6.2）是接收机仍能满足 8% FER 时、来波信号的最弱功率（单位 dBm）。由于该 PHY 支持多种调制格式，表 11-18 为每一种格式给出各自的参考灵敏度，合规 DEV 对其声称支持的每一种格式都必须至少达到该门槛。更稳健（阶数更低）的调制能听到更微弱的信号：QPSK-TCM（带网格编码调制的正交相移键控）达 −82 dBm，DQPSK（差分 QPSK）−75 dBm，随着星座点增多门槛抬高：16-QAM-TCM −74 dBm、32-QAM-TCM −71 dBm、64-QAM-TCM −68 dBm（QAM 即正交幅度调制）。灵敏度在施加纠错之后测量，而真实设备允许优于参考值。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><line x1="40" y1="170" x2="440" y2="170" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="40" y1="20" x2="40" y2="170" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="8" y="95" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" transform="rotate(-90 14 95)">sensitivity (dBm)</text><rect x="60" y="30" width="50" height="140" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="130" y="58" width="50" height="112" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="200" y="62" width="50" height="108" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="270" y="78" width="50" height="92" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="340" y="95" width="50" height="75" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="85" y="185" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">QPSK</text><text x="85" y="26" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">-82</text><text x="155" y="185" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">DQPSK</text><text x="155" y="54" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">-75</text><text x="225" y="185" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">16QAM</text><text x="225" y="58" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">-74</text><text x="295" y="185" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">32QAM</text><text x="295" y="74" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">-71</text><text x="365" y="185" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">64QAM</text><text x="365" y="91" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">-68</text></svg>

caption.en: Reference sensitivity per modulation (Table 11-18): lower-order modulations hear fainter signals. Taller bar = more negative dBm = more sensitive.
caption.zh: 各调制格式的参考灵敏度（表 11-18）：阶数越低的调制能听到越微弱的信号。柱越高 = dBm 越负 = 越灵敏。

blocks.en: The other side of the dynamic range is the receiver maximum input level (11.6.3): the strongest signal the receiver must still demodulate without falling apart. A compliant receiver has to keep the 8% FER even with an input as loud as −10 dBm, for every modulation it supports. Together, 11.6.2 and 11.6.3 bracket the window of signal strengths the radio must cope with. Receiver jamming resistance (11.6.4) then asks: with a desired signal present, how much louder can an interferer in a neighbouring channel be before it breaks you? The test uses the high-density channel plan and distinguishes the adjacent channel (the nearest neighbour in frequency) from the alternate channel (one step further out). Table 11-19 lists the required rejection — for QPSK-TCM, 33 dB on the adjacent channel and 48 dB on the alternate — and Table 11-20 lists exactly which channel numbers play the adjacent/alternate role for each desired channel.
blocks.zh: 动态范围的另一端是接收机最大输入电平（11.6.3）：接收机仍必须正常解调而不崩溃的最强信号。合规接收机即便在 −10 dBm 这么大的输入下，对其支持的每一种调制也都要保持 8% FER。11.6.2 与 11.6.3 合起来界定了电台必须应对的信号强度窗口。接着，接收机抗干扰能力（11.6.4）追问：在存在期望信号时，相邻信道里的干扰可以比它响多少才会把你打垮？测试采用高密度信道规划，并区分相邻信道（频率上最近的邻居）与隔邻信道（再往外一步）。表 11-19 列出所需的抑制量——对 QPSK-TCM，相邻信道 33 dB、隔邻信道 48 dB——表 11-20 则精确列出对每个期望信道而言，哪些信道号扮演相邻/隔邻角色。

blocks.en: Notice the pattern across the tables: the more aggressive the modulation, the easier the receiver is to jam. 64-QAM-TCM needs only 19 dB of adjacent-channel rejection versus QPSK-TCM's 33 dB. High-order constellations pack symbols tightly, so they have less margin against both faint signals (worse sensitivity) and nearby interferers (worse rejection). It is the same engineering trade-off — speed versus robustness — viewed from the receive side.
blocks.zh: 注意跨表格的规律：调制越激进，接收机越容易被干扰。64-QAM-TCM 只需 19 dB 的相邻信道抑制，而 QPSK-TCM 需要 33 dB。高阶星座把符号挤得很密，因此无论面对微弱信号（灵敏度更差）还是邻近干扰（抑制更差），余量都更小。这与发射侧是同一个工程权衡——速度对稳健性——只是从接收侧来看。

blocks.en: Three mechanisms let the receiver report what it senses. CCA performance (11.6.5) governs clear channel assessment — telling the MAC (medium access control) whether the air is busy. A compliant receiver detects energy in the received bandwidth; the start of a valid preamble at or above the DQPSK base-rate minimum sensitivity must flag the medium busy with greater than 90% probability within five CAZAC periods (CAZAC = constant-amplitude zero-autocorrelation, the special preamble sequence), and any signal 20 dB above that minimum must always be reported busy. The detection time, pCcaDetectTime, equals those five CAZAC periods, and 'busy' is held until the end of the frame whose inverted CAZAC sequence was detected.
blocks.zh: 有三套机制让接收机上报它所感知的内容。CCA 性能（11.6.5）规范空闲信道评估（clear channel assessment）——告诉 MAC（介质访问控制）层空中是否繁忙。合规接收机检测接收带宽内的能量；当一段有效前导以 DQPSK 基本速率最小灵敏度或更高的电平出现时，必须在五个 CAZAC 周期内以大于 90% 的概率标示介质繁忙（CAZAC 即恒定幅度零自相关，是那段特殊的前导序列），而任何高出该最小值 20 dB 的信号都必须始终被报告为繁忙。检测时间 pCcaDetectTime 等于这五个 CAZAC 周期，且“繁忙”一直保持到检测出反向 CAZAC 序列的那一帧结束为止。

blocks.en: The remaining two are per-frame quality readouts. Receiver RSSI (11.6.6) — received signal strength indicator — is reported as power relative to the maximum input level (11.6.3), quantised into 8 steps of 8 dB (so a minimum 40 dB range) with ±4 dB step accuracy, and the steps must be monotonic; it is the average power measured in the last CAZAC sequence of the preamble. Link quality indication (11.6.7), or LQI, is finer-grained and is reported only for the TCM-coded QAM modes: it is a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimate taken at the receiver's decision point, including thermal noise, distortion and uncorrected interference. LQI is a 5-bit number spanning 6 dB (value 0x00) to 21.5 dB (value 0x1F) of SNR in equal steps, measured during the TCM MAC frame body and reported after the last FCS symbol.
blocks.zh: 剩下两套是逐帧的质量读数。接收 RSSI（11.6.6）——接收信号强度指示——以相对最大输入电平（11.6.3）的功率上报，量化为 8 个步进、每步 8 dB（因此至少 40 dB 范围），步进精度 ±4 dB，且步进必须单调；它是前导最后一段 CAZAC 序列上测得的平均功率。链路质量指示（11.6.7，即 LQI）粒度更细，且仅对 TCM 编码的 QAM 模式上报：它是在接收机判决点处测得的信噪比（SNR）估计，包含热噪声、失真和未纠正的干扰。LQI 是一个 5 比特数，覆盖 6 dB（取值 0x00）到 21.5 dB（取值 0x1F）的 SNR，等步进，在 TCM MAC 帧体期间测量，并在最后一个 FCS 符号之后上报。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><rect x="30" y="30" width="90" height="34" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="120" y="30" width="120" height="34" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="240" y="30" width="190" height="34" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="75" y="51" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">RSSI b0-b2</text><text x="180" y="51" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">LQI b3-b7</text><text x="335" y="51" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Reserved b8-b23</text><text x="30" y="22" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Fragmentation Control field as receive-status (Fig 11-21)</text></svg>

caption.en: When carried as receive status in an ACK, the Fragmentation Control field packs RSSI (3 bits) and LQI (5 bits) — exactly the values from 11.6.6 and 11.6.7 (clause 11.7).
caption.zh: 当作为接收状态在 ACK 中携带时，分片控制字段打包 RSSI（3 比特）与 LQI（5 比特）——正是 11.6.6 与 11.6.7 给出的值（11.7 条）。

blocks.en: Clause 11.7 (PHY management) is the bookkeeping layer: the PHY PIB (PHY information base) holds the managed objects, attributes, actions and notifications needed to manage this PHY. Table 11-21 defines how supported data rates are bit-encoded into the Supported Data Rates field of the Capability IE (information element) — set the right bits, pad b5-b7 with zeros, and you get one octet (a DEV doing 11/22/33 Mb/s encodes to 0x2). Table 11-22 encodes the preferred fragment size. Two PIB groups follow: the characteristics group (Table 11-23) holds parameters common to most 2.4 GHz implementations — phyType, regulatory domains, current channel, the phyCcaThreshold tied to 11.6.5, and so on — while the implementation group (Table 11-24) holds vendor-specific knobs like antenna diversity, max TX power, power-control step size and power-management levels. Finally, the receive status carried in an Imm-ACK or Dly-ACK frame reuses the RSSI and LQI values defined in 11.6.6 and 11.6.7, packed into the Fragmentation Control field as Figure 11-21 shows — neatly closing the loop between what the receiver measured and what the protocol reports.
blocks.zh: 11.7 条（PHY 管理）是记账层：PHY PIB（PHY 信息库）保存管理该 PHY 所需的受管对象、属性、动作与通知。表 11-21 定义如何把支持的数据速率比特编码进能力 IE（信息元素）的 Supported Data Rates 字段——置好相应比特、把 b5-b7 补零，就得到一个字节（支持 11/22/33 Mb/s 的 DEV 编码为 0x2）。表 11-22 编码首选分片大小。随后是两个 PIB 组：特性组（表 11-23）保存大多数 2.4 GHz 实现共有的参数——phyType、支持的管制域、当前信道、与 11.6.5 关联的 phyCcaThreshold 等——而实现组（表 11-24）保存厂商特定的旋钮，如天线分集、最大发射功率、功率控制步进与功率管理级别。最后，Imm-ACK 或 Dly-ACK 帧中携带的接收状态复用了 11.6.6 与 11.6.7 定义的 RSSI 与 LQI 值，按图 11-21 所示打包进分片控制字段——干净地把“接收机测到什么”与“协议上报什么”这一环闭合起来。

summary.en: Coverage map: where each unit lives (11.6.1-11.6.7, 11.7)

blocks.en: 11.6.1 Error rate criterion — the shared 8% FER yardstick over a 1024-octet PN23 payload, counting the full on-air frame (p.412). 11.6.2 Receiver sensitivity — weakest signal meeting that FER, per-modulation reference values in Table 11-18 (p.412). 11.6.3 Receiver maximum input level — at least -10 dBm upper bound (p.412). 11.6.4 Receiver jamming resistance — adjacent/alternate-channel rejection, Tables 11-19 and 11-20, high-density channel plan (p.412-413). 11.6.5 Receiver CCA performance — energy detection, >90% busy within five CAZAC periods, pCcaDetectTime (p.413-414). 11.6.6 Receiver RSSI — 8 steps of 8 dB, ±4 dB, monotonic, measured on the last preamble CAZAC (p.414). 11.6.7 LQI — 5-bit SNR estimate, 6 to 21.5 dB, TCM-coded QAM modes only (p.414). 11.7 PHY management — the PHY PIB, data-rate and fragment-size encodings (Tables 11-21, 11-22), characteristics and implementation PIB groups (Tables 11-23, 11-24), and receive status in ACK frames via the Fragmentation Control field, Figure 11-21 (p.414-416).
blocks.zh: 11.6.1 错误率准则——以 1024 字节 PN23 载荷为基准、计入完整空口帧的共享 8% FER 标尺（第 412 页）。11.6.2 接收灵敏度——满足该 FER 的最弱信号，各调制的参考值见表 11-18（第 412 页）。11.6.3 接收机最大输入电平——至少 -10 dBm 的上界（第 412 页）。11.6.4 接收机抗干扰能力——相邻/隔邻信道抑制，表 11-19 与 11-20，采用高密度信道规划（第 412-413 页）。11.6.5 接收机 CCA 性能——能量检测，五个 CAZAC 周期内 >90% 报忙，pCcaDetectTime（第 413-414 页）。11.6.6 接收 RSSI——8 个步进、每步 8 dB、±4 dB、单调，测于前导最后一段 CAZAC（第 414 页）。11.6.7 LQI——5 比特 SNR 估计，6 至 21.5 dB，仅限 TCM 编码的 QAM 模式（第 414 页）。11.7 PHY 管理——PHY PIB、数据速率与分片大小编码（表 11-21、11-22）、特性组与实现组 PIB（表 11-23、11-24），以及通过分片控制字段在 ACK 帧中携带的接收状态，图 11-21（第 414-416 页）。

cites.note: Clause 11.6 receiver specifications (11.6.1-11.6.7) on pp.412-414 incl. Tables 11-18 to 11-20; clause 11.7 PHY management on pp.414-416 incl. Tables 11-21 to 11-24 and Figure 11-21.
